title: Bare Bones x Deeper & Darker
description: Compatibility pack for Bare Bones and Deeper & Darker
body:
# Deeper & Darker x Bare Bones

This resource pack establishes seamless compatibility between the Deeper and Darker mod and the Bare Bones resource pack, by providing unified textures matching the style of the latter.

## Requirements

- [Deeper & Darker mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [Bare bones resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)

## Supporting
I do not accept donations, but if you really like this resource pack, please feel free to follow me on [GitHub](https://github.com/cph101)
